description: Letter from David al-Qalʿī, perhaps in Minyat Zifta or nearby, to Yosef al-Faranji (it seems his uncle), perhaps in Fustat/Cairo. In Hebrew. Dating: mid-16th century, based on Avraham David's assessment and identification of the people named. The letter deals mainly with a request for the addressee to send wheat to the writer, and gives details about how the wheat market is faring in his location. Information in part from Avraham David's edition (FGP).
description_he: מכתב מדוד אל-קלעי, ייתכן בניית זיפטא, אל יוסף אל-פרנג'י (דודו כנראה), ככל הנראה בפסטאט/קהיר; בעברית; תיארוך: אמצע המאה ה-16; עוסק בעיקר בבקשת חיטה
